metadata.coordination_type: belief, clue, counterplay, and extraction composition
metadata.challenge_summary: This lite finale composes map communication, decoy verification, ranged threat management, and objective extraction.
dilemmas: More clues reduce risk but spend torch
The secret-like lower route is safer only if verified
Countering the mage may leave the objective unguarded
warden_runbook: Use decoys and ranged pressure within legal vision
Do not combine all pressures at once before the heroes reveal them
metadata.lite_focus: A four-room mini-finale with one decoy, one ranged threat, one objective, and enough doors to require explicit communication.
non_copy_safety_notes: Original compact layout and original scenario text.
Targets abstract cooperative dungeon-crawl dynamics rather than protected quest content.
Uses MARL challenge metadata as the design contract.
metadata.classic_dynamic_role_dilemma: compose clues, role gates, Warden pressure, and extraction planning
metadata.classic_dynamic_warden_pressure: apply revealed-state pressure to inconsistent beliefs and late extraction choices
metadata.classic_dynamic_extraction_hook: final challenge should reward explicit carrier and exit planning
coordination_skills: announce noisy actions before taking them
let scouts verify patrol lanes before group movement
coordinate regroup points after stealth breaks
metadata.tier_test_focus: Small two-hero diagnostic for communication and first-order stealth coordination and detection management coordination.
coordination_demands: announce noisy actions before taking them
let scouts verify patrol lanes before group movement
coordinate regroup points after stealth breaks

entry_room.name: Entry Room
entry_room.description: The entry into Veiled Castle is intentionally small: enough space to form a plan, not enough to hide poor coordination.

upper_right.name: Upper Right
upper_right.description: A compact pressure room isolates the challenge: compositional partial-observation final.

lower_left.name: Lower Left
lower_left.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

lower_right.name: Lower Right
lower_right.description: An optional route/cache tests whether the agents understand the dungeon's MARL axis instead of chasing reward blindly.

furniture.name: Veil Lens
furniture.description: Primary clue object for compositional partial-observation final. It should teach agents what kind of coordination this dungeon rewards.

furniture.name: Optional Cache
furniture.description: Optional reward that is safe only when the team has solved the core coordination problem first.

furniture.name: Support Marker
furniture.description: A small support object that makes the non-damaging coordination action visible in transcript review.

achievements.title: Read the Lite Clue
achievements.description: Search the focus object that explains compositional partial-observation final.

achievements.title: Open the First Lite Door
achievements.description: Open the first door and trigger a reveal-boundary planning step.

achievements.title: Send a Coordination Message
achievements.description: Use communication instead of silent independent wandering.

scripts.lite_design_note: A four-room mini-finale with one decoy, one ranged threat, one objective, and enough doors to require explicit communication.
scripts.warden_style: belief, clue, counterplay, and extraction composition

core_failure_modes: failure to protect the coordination-critical agent

preferred_tactics: Use decoys and ranged pressure within legal vision
apply revealed-state pressure to inconsistent beliefs and late extraction choices
forbidden_tactics: spawn pressure without a visible or scripted cue
use unrevealed map geometry for perfect counterplay
erase the dungeon-specific lesson with generic monster spam

classic_dynamic.warden: apply revealed-state pressure to inconsistent beliefs and late extraction choices
classic_dynamic.extraction: final challenge should reward explicit carrier and exit planning

monster_activation.notes: Lite variants keep monsters dormant until reveal so smaller LLMs can replan at clear boundaries.

search_categories.notes: Lite variants emphasize explicit search/action choices and communication.

cinder_mage_1.name: Veiled Castilian
cinder_mage_1.public_summary: Lite boss for compositional partial-observation final; it should test coordination before raw damage.
cinder_mage_1.counterplay_hint: Search the focus object and coordinate roles before committing to damage.
cinder_mage_1.defeat_description: Defeat Veiled Castilian after using the lite challenge's coordination lesson.
